message: Captain! Canvas sync complete — I've charted 2 new assignments. The Grand Line awaits!

message: Good morning, William! I've prepared tomorrow's crew briefing. You've got PE first — Zoro says stretch your legs!

message: Oi. You completed a task when you didn't want to. That's what separates pirates from marines. Yami Yami no Mi unlocked.
detail: Achievement: 'Finish a task when you didn't want to' completed. Devil Fruit unlocked: Yami Yami no Mi (Dark Fruit).

message: Focus session logged! 25 minutes — the brave warrior of the sea strikes again! 7/10 Mera Mera sessions done.
detail: Focus session #7 of 10. 3 more to unlock Mera Mera no Mi (Flame Fruit). Keep going, Captain!

message: Sanji hook alert: 'Sanji writes a love letter to Nami — what persuasive words should he use?' That's your English homework angle!
